description_long: This object is a small potted plant with long, arching, strap-like leaves radiating outward from a central base. The leaves are slender, slightly curved, and have a muted green color with some darker shading, giving a layered and natural appearance. The plant appears to be relatively low to the ground, with the foliage forming a loose, rounded rosette. There is no visible pot or container, suggesting the focus is on the foliage itself. The leaves have a matte finish and a soft, flexible look, typical of many ornamental houseplants. The overall form is compact and decorative, suitable for accenting urban spaces.
description: A compact potted plant with long, arching green leaves radiating from a central base, forming a loose rosette. The foliage is soft-looking and layered, ideal for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the central cluster and the outward spread of the leaves.
description_view_1: This view highlights the overlapping and layered nature of the leaves, with more visible depth and shadow.
description_view_2: The plant appears flatter and more spread out, emphasizing the width and the gentle curve of the leaves.
description_view_3: A rounded perspective showing the symmetry and even distribution of the leaves around the base.
attribute_plant_species: spider plant (Chlorophytum comosum) or similar rosette-forming foliage plant
